crusade.name: The Crusade
crusade.description: Warriors of honor and fury, sworn to their war-god.
crusade.lore: United under the banner of Odin, the Crusade marches with righteous fury. Humans bring adaptability and cunning, while Barbarians unleash primal rage upon their enemies.

legion.name: The Legion
legion.description: Dark armies united by bloodlust and death magic.
legion.lore: Madra's Legion thrives on destruction. Orcs crush their foes with brute strength while the Undead overwhelm with dark sorcery and sheer persistence beyond death.

fabled.name: The Fabled
fabled.description: Ancient alliance of magic and craftsmanship.
fabled.lore: The eldest alliance, guided by the mysterious Omni. Elves wield arcane mastery while Dwarves provide unbreakable fortitude and legendary forge-craft.
